prompt: A professional 2D Perler bead pattern design. On the left side of the canvas is a vertical color palette/legend showing color blocks with accurate numbers (e.g., #01, #02). The main area of the canvas displays a full-body pixel-style character. The character must be presented in a perfect 45x45 grid matrix. Each pixel must have clear, clean, non-blurred boundaries. A crisp 2D sprite, blueprint style, white background, high technical detail, independent design.
